tagline: Reliable Brett Handyman Services in Noosa

services.name: General Repairs
services.description: Door handles, TV bracket installation, furniture assembly, squeaky hinges, hanging shelves, and more

services.name: Carpentry & Woodwork
services.description: Repair and maintain decks, fences, pergolas, and cabinets with quality craftsmanship

services.name: Outdoor Maintenance
services.description: Pressure washing, gutter maintenance and repair, yard cleanups, hedge trimming

services.name: Kitchen & Bathroom
services.description: Tapware swaps, shower resealing, vanity replacements, cabinet repairs � fast, neat, hassle-free

services.name: Rental Property Maintenance
services.description: End-of-lease repairs, general maintenance, smoke alarm battery changes � ideal for landlords and tenants

reviews.name: Carmen Meikle
reviews.text: Wonderful guy, quality workmanship. Dont wonder, just hire him!

reviews.name: Jacki D.
reviews.text: I'm a woman who lives alone so it's really important to me that I get an honest man who isn't going to rip me off. To this end I was very impressed with Brett's work and professionalism.

reviews.name: Kate Morris
reviews.text: Great communication. Great friendly service! Really happy! Will definitely contact Brett again!

reviews.name: Paul Golightly
reviews.text: Good knowledge, hard worker, wide range of skills and pleasant to deal with, would definitely use again.

reviews.name: Paul Taylor
reviews.text: Very happy with Brett's work, fixing a front screen door, and putting in some garage shelving. We would definitely recommend him for handyman jobs.

reviews.name: Storey Digital Art
reviews.text: Efficient, helpful and friendly. Highly recommend Brett Handyman Services.

reviews.name: Rose McLennan
reviews.text: Highly recommend Brett. Punctual and experienced in so many tasks. My initial problem was a repair to the bottom of my fence, that required hardwood posts and new palings.

reviews.name: Mike John
reviews.text: I researched local trades to do a paving job at my house and Brett's name came up several times with excellent feedback from happy customers. I can only echo the same � top quality work.

about.bio: Brett grew up in Melbourne spending weekends on home projects and in the garage with his family. That hands-on start sparked a passion for building and fixing things properly. Today, he brings a sharp eye, solid skills, and a no-corners-cut attitude to every job, big or small.
about.hometown: Grew up in Melbourne, now based in Noosa QLD
about.experience: 15+ years in residential repairs, carpentry, and property maintenance
about.education: Fitting, Turning & Tool Making � Box Hill TAFE. Structural & Mechanical Engineering � Dandenong TAFE
about.passion: I love the satisfaction of solving problems with my hands. Whether it is a quick fix or a full deck rebuild, I treat every home like it is my own.
